questions.prompt: My sister ______ a teacher at the primary school.
I ______ two younger brothers and one older sister.
There is ______ interesting article about families in today's paper.
My parents ______ the news every morning before work.
The college library closes ______ six o'clock on Fridays.
Last week I ______ a novel about a family in a small town.
This chapter is ______ than the one we read last week.
Next term the college ______ open a new reading room.
My cousin ______ borrows books from the library at weekends.
There aren't ______ copies of the book left in the shop.
I ______ crime novels for ten years, and I still enjoy them.
If you finish the chapter tonight, we ______ discuss it at the meeting.
The main prize ______ to a young writer from Ipoh last year.
You ______ return the book by Friday, or you will have to pay a fine.
She ______ for the same publisher since she left university.
If I had a quieter room at home, I ______ read a great deal more.
If we ______ the event earlier, far more members would have come.
The chairperson said that the next discussion ______ the following month.
The novelist ______ first book we read in May is visiting our college.
I wish I ______ more time to read during the working week.
By the time I joined the group, they ______ already read six novels.
Rarely ______ a first novel attracted so much attention from critics.
Had she studied literature at university, she ______ a teacher of English today.
It was the quiet ending ______ made the whole novel worth reading.
The manuscript ______ have been lost in the post; we simply cannot be sure.
Choose the word from the bank that has the same meaning as each word below.
Match each word about books with its definition.

bank: a long written story about imaginary people and events
the person who writes a book
one of the numbered parts into which a book is divided
the series of events that make up a story
an article giving an opinion about a new book
a book that gives the meanings of words
a shop where new books are sold
a place where books can be borrowed free of charge
a short summary printed on the back cover
a list of the books used in a piece of research

answers: a long written story about imaginary people and events
the person who writes a book
one of the numbered parts into which a book is divided
the series of events that make up a story
an article giving an opinion about a new book

questions.prompt: Choose the word from the bank that best completes each sentence.

items.text: Our tutor will ______ three novels for us to choose between.
Please ______ the book to the library before the end of the month.
We were asked to ______ the whole chapter in a single sentence.
The judges will ______ the winner of the writing competition on Friday.
Reading widely is the fastest way to ______ your vocabulary.

questions.prompt: Choose the word from the bank that goes with each verb to make a common expression.
Match each word about studying with the phrase that explains it.

bank: a formal talk given to a large group of students
a short teaching session for one student or a very small group
a piece of work that a student must complete and hand in
a class in which students discuss a topic with their tutor
comments telling you how well you have done and how to improve
a formal test taken at the end of a course
a list of the topics that a course will cover
the mark given for a piece of written work
a long essay written over several months
a period of practical experience in a company

answers: a formal talk given to a large group of students
a short teaching session for one student or a very small group
a piece of work that a student must complete and hand in
a class in which students discuss a topic with their tutor
comments telling you how well you have done and how to improve
